title: cota macrantha
intro: Cota macrantha, also known as large-flowered cota, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cota macrantha include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having potential antimicrobial effects. Cota macrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
